metadata.description: Collection of agent skills for AI coding assistants

plugins.name: ai-skills
plugins.description: Collection of agent skills: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MSSQL, Imagen, Azure DevOps, Atlassian (Jira + Confluence), Google Workspace (Gmail, Calendar, Chat, Docs, Drive, Sheets, Slides), NotebookLM, Jules, Manus, Deep Research, Outline, ElevenLabs, Google TTS.
